headline: Kabupaten Sidoarjo flood update for January 2026
summary: Banjir di Kabupaten Sidoarjo prompted limited evacuation in low-lying neighborhoods selama periode peninjauan terbatas.
summary_id: Banjir di Kabupaten Sidoarjo prompted limited evacuation in low-lying neighborhoods selama periode peninjauan terbatas.
summary_en: Flooding in Kabupaten Sidoarjo prompted limited evacuation in low-lying neighborhoods during the bounded review window.
